calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc And Req. For Default Judgment By Court
Off Calendar Apr-24-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Michael C. Starkey, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, HANSON BRIDGETT LLP.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) CORE WAFER SYSTEMS, INC., a Nevada Coporation; and COREWAFER INDUSTRIES, Inc., a Nevada Corporation, fka Action Products International, Inc.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Declarations filed in support of Request for Default Prove-Up are admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Defendants herein CORE WAFER SYSTEMS, INC., a Nevada Corporation; and COREWAFER INDUSTRIES, Inc., a Nevada Corporation, fka Action Products International, Inc. are jointly and severally liable to pay plaintiff herein Hanson Bridgett LLP the sum of $53,722. 26 plus interest thereon at the rate of the percent (10%) per annum from the date from June 25, 2013, the date of the original judgment, until paid. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED that this amended judgment shall suprsede the June 25, 2013, judgment against CORE WAFER SYSTEMS, INC.
Amended Judgment signed in open court.
